Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_manual_pill_fivecolorsrecipes
Esoterica.Desc: A forbidden manual of the Black Lightning Dao. Contains ultimate elemental pill recipes that grant absolute elemental mastery.
Esoterica.EffectDesc:
Acquire the following elixir recipes: 
Five Colors Pill
Water Restraining Pill
Fire Restraining Pill
Metal Restraining Pill
Wood Restraining Pill
Earth Restraining Pill

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_manual_pill_innerqirecipes
Esoterica.Desc: Ancient recipes of the void. These pills amplify inner Qi beyond mortal comprehension.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: Acquire the following elixir recipes: \nQi Compression Pill\nInner Cauldron Pill

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_manual_pill_earthlydevilelixirs
Esoterica.Desc: Forbidden battle elixirs born from black lightning alchemy. Grants devastating combat power.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: Acquire the following elixir recipes: \nBedevilment Pill\nMalignancy Pill

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_manual_pill_heavenlybookfragment
Esoterica.Desc: A complete fragment stolen from heaven itself. Contains the ultimate method for condensing tribulation lightning into pill form.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: Acquire the following elixir recipe: \nCondensed Tribulation Pill

Esoterica.Name: Mod_trib_manual_story_demonblood
Esoterica.Desc: Journal of an ancient nameless demonic cultivator, it contains the trials and tribulations they overcame during their life. Hidden amongst the pages is a map to their residence.
Esoterica.EffectDesc: Acquire information on the following locale: \nVillage of Dunes
